name: mcp-pooler
description: Caching MCP proxy (connection pooler) in front of a MetaMCP namespace. Holds ONE persistent upstream session (keeps backends warm — no per-client cold-spawn, no process leak) and caches tools/list, so ephemeral MCP clients (e.g. per-task Hermes agents that wait ~0.75s for discovery) get instant tool discovery and native tool calls. MetaMCP stays the source of truth for the catalog; add an MCP in the admin and it appears here on the next cache refresh. Stateless — no database or volumes. Reachable on network_public as <stack-key>_pooler:9100.

env.name: MCP_POOLER_UPSTREAM_KEY
env.prompt: MetaMCP API key (bearer) for that namespace
